title: Wind Energy Engineers
description: Design underground or overhead wind farm collector systems and prepare and develop site specifications.

tasks.text: Create or maintain wind farm layouts, schematics, or other visual documentation for wind farms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend process or infrastructure changes to improve wind turbine performance, reduce operational costs, or comply with regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create models to optimize the layout of wind farm access roads, crane pads, crane paths, collection systems, substations, switchyards, or transmission lines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide engineering technical support to designers of prototype wind turbines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate experimental wind turbines or wind turbine technologies for properties such as aerodynamics, production, noise, and load.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop active control algorithms, electronics, software, electromechanical, or electrohydraulic systems for wind turbines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop specifications for wind technology components, such as gearboxes, blades, generators, frequency converters, or pad transformers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test wind turbine components, using mechanical or electronic testing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oversee the work activities of wind farm consultants or subcontractors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test wind turbine equipment to determine effects of stress or fatigue.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor wind farm construction to ensure compliance with regulatory standards or environmental requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct balance of plant (BOP) construction, generator installation, testing, commissioning, or supervisory control and data acquisition (SCADA) to ensure compliance with specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze operation of wind farms or wind farm components to determine reliability, performance, and compliance with specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform root cause analysis on wind turbine tower component failures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design underground or overhead wind farm collector systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write reports to document wind farm collector system test results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
